question: What large text status is displayed on the Instant Pot screen while oil is being poured into the pot? A. On B. Hot C. Start D. High
How many biscuits are held in the black air fryer basket shown before plating?
What material is the inner cooking pot of the appliance made of? A. Ceramic B. Plastic C. Stainless Steel D. Wood
How many stainless steel Instant Pot pressure cookers are visible?

Which of the previously seen hand appearances is visible in this clip? A. <hand tilting white ceramic bowl> B. <hand dropping yellow butter cubes> C. <hand with a silver ring on the ring finger> D. <hand pouring white powder>

Did the video display a title card for Sausage Gravy & Biscuits AND show the Sauté button being pressed? A. Only title card displayed B. Both title card displayed and Sauté button pressed C. Only Sauté button pressed D. Neither displayed nor pressed
Where is the Instant Pot positioned relative to the plate of food in the title card scene? A. behind B. to the right C. above D. below
Where is the stainless steel pot situated relative to the black appliance housing? A. to the right B. behind C. inside D. above
What action is the person performing in the segment with the metal pot? A. Pouring gravy B. Stirring meat C. Plating biscuits
Describe the sequence of actions performed on the Instant Pot to start cooking.
canonical_answer: At [11s], a thumb presses the Sauté button on the white control panel; at [13s], the digital display reads On with an orange light illuminated; at [15s], a hand pours yellow oil from a white bottle into the hot pot; at [19s], a wooden spatula stirs browned ground meat inside the stainless steel liner.

question: Has the white liquid started pouring into the metal pot yet?

What specific ingredient addition happens in this segment? A. Yellow butter cubes are dropped into the pot. B. Dark granular seasoning is sprinkled onto the liquid. C. White powder is poured from a small glass bowl. D. Yellow oil is poured from a white squeeze bottle.

How has the content inside the metal pot changed from the oil pouring scene to the butter adding scene? A. It now contains biscuits covered in gravy B. It now contains browned meat and butter cubes C. It now contains yellow scrambled eggs D. It now contains a whole sausage patty
Where is the ladled gravy poured after being scooped from the pot?
canonical_answer: The gravy is poured over the left half of a split golden-brown biscuit.

question: What step came IMMEDIATELY before pouring oil into the pot? A. Stirring the browned ground meat B. Revealing the empty inner pot C. Pressing the 'Sauté' button D. Adding butter cubes to the meat
Has the step 'Add butter chunks to pot' been done by now?

Where were the biscuits baked before serving? A. Toaster oven B. Unable to answer C. Countertop oven D. Conventional oven
Which brand of sausage is cooked in the pot? A. Jimmy Dean B. Bob Evans C. Johnsonville D. Unable to answer
What dish is being prepared in the video? A. Chicken and Dumplings B. Beef Stew C. Sausage Gravy and Biscuits D. Creamy Potato Soup

Given what is visible so far, could the person ladle the sausage gravy from the pot? A. Yes — metal ladle is holding the creamy gravy inside the open pot B. No — no ladle or serving utensil is visible to scoop the liquid C. No — the pot is covered by a lid preventing access to the contents D. No — the contents are still solid browned meat and not yet liquid gravy
